title: Google Meet’s new homepage gives you an overview of your meetings.
summary: The “revamped” homepage, rolling out starting today , lists all of your upcoming meetings with links to notes and calendar attachments for each one. It also has options for navigating through weeks and months to see past and future meetings.
caption: output/2026-07-21/google-meet-s-new-homepage-gives-you-an-overview-of-your-meetings.txt
